description_long: This kiosk features a robust, industrial design with a large rectangular digital display mounted at the top, which shows a grayscale screen with text and a partial image of a person. The display is encased in a thick, dark frame, and a numeric keypad is visible on the right side of the screen. The supporting structure beneath the screen is angular and solid, constructed from dark metal panels with visible bolts and mechanical joints, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The base is wide and stable, with directional arrows and a small recessed compartment, possibly for cable management or access panels. Subtle signage and symbols are present on the front and top surfaces, and the overall form is compact and functional, suitable for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A sturdy, dark-colored kiosk with a large digital display, numeric keypad, and angular metal support structure, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display with visible text and image, numeric keypad, and signage on the upper support.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled support structure, top signage, and directional arrow at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the mechanical joints, recessed compartments, and the kiosk's robust construction.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible support angles and directional arrow at the base.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the front structure, showing text ('We'll Be Right Back') and image; small printed symbols on the front and top panels
attribute_roof_design: flat, integrated with the display housing, constructed from the same dark metal material, no overhangs or decorative elements
